meaning: n.通古斯满语族(阿尔泰语系的语族之一)
examples: Animal cult is one of the most important content in the various Tungusic tales.
The minimal prosodic word is bimoraic in Manchu-Tungusic languages, as assumed in the present article.
The nourishing of Shaman culture makes the tree worship of Man-Tungusic nationalities still fresh after long.
